issues.comment: Method `website` calls `object.user_profile.website` but `object.user_profile` could be nil, causing NoMethodError that would break serialization.
Method `include_website_name` calls `website.present?` which calls the `website` method that could fail with NoMethodError if `object.user_profile` is nil, breaking the include condition check.

Expression `URI(website.to_s).host rescue nil` catches all exceptions with broad rescue, potentially masking NoMethodError from `website` method when `user_profile` is nil rather than just URI parsing errors.
